hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.controller.ts ]] && grep -qE '@Api(Operation|Body|Response|Param|Query|Header|Produces)\(' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo '❌ BLOCKED: Swagger decorators belong in docs/*.docs.ts files, not inline on controllers. Use applyDecorators() in the docs/ folder.' >&2; exit 1; fi; exit 0

FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.ts && "$FILE" != *.docs.ts && "$FILE" != *.dto.ts ]] && grep -nE '^\s*/\*\*' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null | grep -vE '@deprecated' | head -1 | grep -q '.'; then echo '⚠️  WARNING: Use // comments, not /** */ JSDoc style. Only /** @deprecated */ is allowed.' >&2; fi; exit 0

FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *src/modules/* || "$FILE" == *src/services/* ]] && grep -qE "import.*\b(BadRequestException|UnauthorizedException|NotFoundException|ConflictException|ForbiddenException)\b.*from '@nestjs/common'" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo '❌ BLOCKED: Import exceptions from @vritti/api-sdk, NOT @nestjs/common' >&2; exit 1; fi; exit 0

FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.controller.ts ]] && grep -nE '^[^/]*return\s+await\s+' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null | head -3 | grep -q '.'; then echo '⚠️  WARNING: Avoid "return await" in controllers unless inside try-catch. Just return the Promise directly for better performance.' >&2; fi; exit 0
